name: KaTeX Math
description: Render LaTeX math equations ($...$ and $$...$$) inline in the Markdown editor using KaTeX
author: Yuan Gao

marketplace.tagline: Live LaTeX math rendering for the Markdown editor
marketplace.longDescription: Adds inline ($...$) and display-mode ($$...$$) LaTeX math rendering to the WYSIWYG Markdown editor, powered by KaTeX. Equations render as you type, support click-to-edit with a live preview, round-trip cleanly to plain Markdown, and work inside blockquotes, lists, and tables. Includes slash commands for inserting math and an AI tool so Claude can author equations directly.
highlights: Inline ($x$) and block ($$x$$) math rendered with KaTeX
Works inside blockquotes, lists, and tables
Round-trips through plain Markdown — no proprietary syntax
AI tool: Claude can write equations directly into your document

slashCommands.title: Inline Math
slashCommands.description: Insert an inline LaTeX math expression

slashCommands.title: Block Math
slashCommands.description: Insert a display-mode LaTeX math block
